name: How long until my Chicago law firm shows in Google AI Overviews after optimizing?

mainEntity.name: How long until my Chicago law firm shows in Google AI Overviews after optimizing?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Visible results in 2-4 weeks with schema and fresh content; full authority in 3-6 months.** AI crawls fast but builds trust via consistent signals.[1][3]

Speed depends on prior E-E-A-T and competition; updates propagate quicker than traditional SEO.[1]

**Key Factors:**
- Schema implementation: immediate crawl.[1]
- Content freshness: weekly boosts.[1]
- Competitor gaps: exploit fast.

**Practical Guidance:** Deploy markup today, publish 1 local Chicago page/week, use AI Monitor tools. Re-crawl via Google Search Console.

Patience yields compounding visibility.
